code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut have = false
mut best_abs = 0
mut best_val = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = false
  if i == n
    is_ws = true
  else
    let bopt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b = match bopt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let parsed = string.parse_int(current)
      match parsed
      when Some(v)
        let av = if v < 0
          -v
        else
          v
        end
        if not have
          have = true
          best_abs = av
          best_val = v
        else if av < best_abs
          best_abs = av
          best_val = v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
